start: ^NPC: Before you is the Research and Extension Building.
continue_2: ^NPC: This office is known as the Office of the Vice President for Research, Extension, and Innovation.
continue_3: ^NPC: OVPREI carries out quality research, sustainable extension programs, and innovative activities for the university.
continue_4: ^NPC: It also develops institutional policies and programs related to research and extension.
continue_5: ^NPC: The office advocates scholarly works of faculty and coordinates policies that affect research and extension initiatives.
continue_6: ^PLAYER: Ah. The life of a true devoted scholar — researching.
continue_7: ^NPC: New knowledge is acquired through research.
continue_8: ^NPC: It’s one of the reasons civilization has advanced.
continue_9: ^NPC: Don’t forget to come to us if you have interesting research ideas.
continue_10: ^NPC: Be on your way now. Goodbye.
